category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Niger EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入尼日尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入尼日：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Niger ARSE / NIGELEC project gates, IEC 61851 safety and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, 220/380 V 50 Hz grid coordination, Sahel heat and dust derating, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与尼日尔ARSE / NIGELEC项目门槛、IEC 61851安全及IEC 61000 EMC证据、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、220/380 V 50 Hz电网协调、萨赫勒高温沙尘降额，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與尼日ARSE / NIGELEC項目門檻、IEC 61851安全及IEC 61000 EMC證據、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、220/380 V 50 Hz電網協調、薩赫勒高溫沙塵降額，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Niger, the practical gaps are not a mature national EVSE certification pathway but project-specific ARSE / NIGELEC approval, IEC-family safety and EMC evidence, hardware conversion from China GB/T 20234 connectors to IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC, and deployment limits caused by Niger's low electrification and grid capacity constraints. Niger's nominal low-voltage grid is commonly stated as 220/380 V, 50 Hz, so the China voltage-frequency baseline is close, but site capacity, protection settings, harmonics, earthing, metering, and commissioning must be confirmed with NIGELEC. As of 2026-06-14, a single official nationwide Niger EV charger whole-unit certification rule could not be confirmed from public sources; exporters should treat four-wheel public charging as extremely nascent and evaluate smaller 2/3-wheeler charging, solar-hybrid, and off-grid use cases with severe heat, dust, service, and spare-parts constraints.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入尼日尔时，实际差距并非成熟的全国EVSE整机认证路径，而是项目级ARSE / NIGELEC审批、IEC体系安全及EMC证据、从中国GB/T 20234接口硬件改为交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2，以及尼日尔低电气化率和电网容量约束带来的部署限制。尼日尔低压电网通常表述为220/380 V、50 Hz，与中国电压频率基线接近，但站点容量、保护整定、谐波、接地、计量和调试仍须与NIGELEC确认。截至2026年6月14日，未能从公开来源确认尼日尔全国统一的电动汽车充电桩整机强制认证规则；出口商应将四轮车公共充电视为极早期市场，并在严重高温、沙尘、服务和备件限制下评估两/三轮车充电、太阳能混合和离网应用。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入尼日時，實際差距並非成熟的全國EVSE整機認證路徑，而是項目級ARSE / NIGELEC審批、IEC體系安全及EMC證據、從中國GB/T 20234接口硬體改為交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2，以及尼日低電氣化率和電網容量約束帶來的部署限制。尼日低壓電網通常表述為220/380 V、50 Hz，與中國電壓頻率基線接近，但站點容量、保護整定、諧波、接地、計量和調試仍須與NIGELEC確認。截至2026年6月14日，未能從公開來源確認尼日全國統一的電動汽車充電樁整機強制認證規則；出口商應將四輪車公共充電視為極早期市場，並在嚴重高溫、沙塵、服務和備件限制下評估兩/三輪車充電、太陽能混合和離網應用。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ARSE licence, NIGELEC grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, operators, and installers should verify current Niger conformity assessment rules, ARSE and NIGELEC project requirements, IEC standard editions, donor-lender tender clauses, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ARSE许可、NIGELEC并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行尼日尔合格评定规则、ARSE和NIGELEC项目要求、IEC标准版本、捐助方/贷款方招标条款及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ARSE許可、NIGELEC併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行尼日合格評定規則、ARSE和NIGELEC項目要求、IEC標準版本、捐助方/貸款方招標條款及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
